cleanFixture: Clean fixture used Fixture OCR Adapter, returned 7 lines, and quality gate marked quick_review.
blurryFixture: Blurry fixture returned 5 unresolved lines and confirmation returned HTTP 400.
croppedFixture: Cropped fixture returned 5 quality warnings and mode careful_review.
safetyGate: Pre-confirm analytics stayed unchanged, then post-confirm created 4 cost-history records and 6 alerts with supplier-price reason codes present.
failedJob: External provider defaulted to unconfigured, returned HTTP 503, and produced 1 failed OCR job entries without mutating analytics.
